mapper.sql:
/* wms-inventory-invnexpdatemod-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnExpdateModRefSql - 유통기한 변경 조회 SQL */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , B.CTNM , A.OWKEY , C.ZNKEY , D.ZNNM , C.ARKEY , E.ARNM , A.LCKEY , C.LCSTORGTYPECD , A.ICKEY , F.ICNM , G.BARCODE , H.IVATKEY , H.PRDCTDATE , H.EXPDATE AS BF_EXPDATE , H.EXPDATE , A.TOTQTY AS BF_TOTQTY , A.TOTQTY , A.AVQTY , A.ALQTY , A.HOLDQTY , H.IVATSTATUSCD , F.EXPCKYN , F.EXPCKTYPECD , A.IVSERIALNO , A.IVSERIALDIVCD , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.ZNKEY = D.ZNKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND C.ARKEY = E.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC F ON A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = F.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE G ON A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = G.ICKEY AND G.UOM = 'EA' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.IVATKEY = H.IVATKEY WHERE 1=1 AND A.TOTQTY >= 0 AND D.ZNTYPECD = '10' /* 보관존 */ AND F.EXPCKYN = 'Y' )
WHERE #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
